dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal is context-dependent (LONG in uptrends, SHORT in downtrends). Entry uses 100-period SMA with 2-bar confirmation as specified. Exit triggers on single close below/above MA per rules. Stop loss encoded as 2.5x ATR multiple. Wide stops and large drawdown tolerance (18%) align with trend-following philosophy. Confirmation bars represented as AND logic requiring two consecutive closes on correct side of MA.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal is context-dependent (LONG in uptrends, SHORT in downtrends). Entry uses 100-period SMA with 2-bar confirmation as specified. Exit triggers on single close below/above MA per rules. Stop loss encoded as 2.5x ATR multiple. Wide stops and large drawdown tolerance (18%) align with trend-following philosophy. Confirmation bars represented as AND logic requiring two consecutive closes on correct side of MA.

source_rule_text: A trader should use very long-term decision-making systems with wide stops to filter out market noise and catch larger trends, accepting that this requires tolerance for large retracements.
